overview: Temur Control in Standard stabilizes through resource acceleration and graveyard recursion, leveraging Stock Up for early mana and Consult the Star Charts for flexible draw. The deck aims to outlast opponents by cycling spells into the graveyard and reactivating them via Flashback. Victory comes from maintaining board control while building a reusable hand of value-generating cards.
win_conditions: Drawing into answers with Consult the Star Charts
Outvaluing opponents through Stock Up acceleration

early_game: Cast Stock Up to ramp and draw
Begin cycling cards for Flashback fuel
mid_game: Use Consult the Star Charts to find specific answers
late_game: Control the board with repeated removal

key_cards.name: Consult the Star Charts
key_cards.notes: Draw into answers when ahead, or cycle to fuel Flashback when behind.

key_cards.name: Stock Up
key_cards.notes: Play early to accelerate mana and draw cards, enabling faster access to flashback spells.

key_cards.name: Flashback
key_cards.notes: Prioritize cycling or discarding spells with this ability to reuse them for board control or value.

sequencing_tips: Cycle low-value cards early to fuel Flashback
Hold up interaction before casting Stock Up
Use Consult the Star Charts to dig for specific answers
Prioritize Flashback on high-impact spells over minor ones

matchups.advice: Focus on early interaction and graveyard setup.
Race with flashback recursion and card advantage.
Stabilize with Consult the Star Charts and outvalue them.
